name: mcp-context-forge
description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) Gateway. Serves as a central management point for tools, resources, and prompts that can be accessed by MCP-compatible LLM applications. Converts REST API endpoints to MCP, composes virtual MCP servers with added security and observability, and converts between protocols (stdio, SSE).

findings_summary.reassessment_reason: SecM audit: all injection/obfuscation findings are false positives (test files, documentation, vendored JS, security tools). Safety overrides bypassed per PM approval.

agent_a.comment: Docs quality 9/10. README present. 12 features, 4 permissions claimed.

agent_b.comment: 1652 files analyzed. Found: 97 network, 35 file, 88 env, 15 system calls. Primary: python.

agent_c_star.comment: 4069 findings: 9 critical, 2368 high, 1311 medium, 381 low. Obfuscation detected!. Injection patterns found!.

agent_d.comment: Score 0. 0 mismatches. Risk: critical. Safety overrides: applied.

agent_e.comment: Rejected. Confidence 95%. Deterministic override: injection patterns detected.

agent_audit.manager_summary: 5/5 agents completed. Score: 0/100, Risk: critical. 0 mismatches, 4069 scanner findings. Rejected at 95% confidence. Safety overrides triggered.

pm_override.reason: PM internet-verified: IBM official mcp-context-forge security gateway. All injection findings from LLMGuard test payloads and exfiltration detector plugins that decode base64 to inspect it. Project runs 40+ security scans in CI (Semgrep, CodeQL, Gitleaks, Trivy).
